highlights.title: Read Anywhere, Offline
highlights.detail: Download books and chapters to read on the plane, the subway, or anywhere without a connection.

highlights.title: Listen on the Go
highlights.detail: Every chapter can be narrated aloud, with adjustable speed and a Live Activity that keeps your place.

highlights.title: Beautiful, Adjustable Type
highlights.detail: Premium typography with reader themes, font scaling, and full Dynamic Type support.

highlights.title: Home Screen Widgets
highlights.detail: Track your streak, jump back into your current chapter, and see what's due for review — right from your Home Screen.
